title.en: Is there available power for device?

titleFormatted.en: Does [[device]] have available power for [[required_kw]] kW?

hint.en: True when the house has room for this device to draw the requested kW. PELS waits about 60 seconds after limiting the device, and asks for extra room when recent attempts to bring it back already fell short — so flows do not flap the device on and off.
